subtasks.description: What are the top 3 publishers by total spend in fiscal year 2024?

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: SELECT consumption_facts.publisher, SUM(consumption_facts.amount_usd) AS total_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE consumption_facts.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY consumption_facts.publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 3
